E.C.U Documentation
Get started
  • Home
  • Marketplace
  • ECUs

DC4_P3.1_v2

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 7E1
Recv ID: 7E9
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 6E
Func Name: BVA

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "4",
    "supplier": "487",
    "soft": "2535",
    "version": "0260"
  },
  {

    "soft": "2535",
    "version": "0300"
  },
  {
    "diagversion": "4",
    "supplier": "487",
    "soft": "2535",
    "version": "0310"
  }
]

[
  {
    "minbytes": 62,
    "sentbytes": "2182",
    "name": "Multiplex Network Diagnostic",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Mux messaging reference": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Bus off parameter": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Mute module parameter": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Producer ECM absent": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Producer ABS absent": {
        "firstbyte": 8,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Producer BCM absent": {
        "firstbyte": 10,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Producer ACC absent": {
        "firstbyte": 13,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Producer AT DC4": {
        "firstbyte": 15,
        "ref": true
      },
      "reserved": {
        "firstbyte": 9,
        "ref": true
      },
      "reserved 1": {
        "firstbyte": 11,
        "ref": true
      },
      "reserved 2": {
        "firstbyte": 14,
        "ref": true
      },
      "reserved 3": {
        "firstbyte": 16,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 2,
    "replybytes": "5100",
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "11FF",
    "name": "ECUReset",
    "deny_sds": [
      "nosds"
    ],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "ResetMode": {
        "firstbyte": 2
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 3,
    "replybytes": "700000",
    "sentbytes": "300000",
    "name": "Output Control",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "Output Control Command": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      },
      "Output Temporary Control List": {
        "firstbyte": 2
      }
    },
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Output Control Status": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 2,
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "23000000000000",
    "name": "Read Memory By Address",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "Memory address": {
        "firstbyte": 2
      },
      "Memory size": {
        "firstbyte": 6
      }
    },
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Record values": {
        "firstbyte": 2
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 20,
    "sentbytes": "21A0",
    "name": "Torque management frame",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Initial gear number": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Final gear number": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "ref": true
      },
      "AT_Torque Control Type": {
        "firstbyte": 9,
        "ref": true
      },
      "TransmRangeEngaged_Target": {
        "firstbyte": 8,
        "ref": true
      },
      "State of clutch 2": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "ref": true
      },
      "TransmRangeEngaged_Current": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "ref": true
      },
      "FastTorqueRequest": {
        "firstbyte": 10,
        "ref": true
      },
      "State of clutch 1": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "ref": true
      },
      "MeanEffectiveTorque": {
        "firstbyte": 14,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Limit_Slow Torque Request": {
        "firstbyte": 12,
        "ref": true
      },
      "EngineTorque_WithouTAReq": {
        "firstbyte": 16,
        "ref": true
      },
      "idleSpeed Request": {
        "firstbyte": 18,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Power Train Setpoint": {
        "firstbyte": 19,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Cranking Autorization": {
        "firstbyte": 20,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 26,
    "sentbytes": "21A1",
    "name": "Gear shifts management frame",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Initial gear number": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      },
      "Final gear number": {
        "firstbyte": 4
      },
      "Selected program": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "ref": true
      },
      "GearSetpoint of ASC": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Raw pedal position": {
        "firstbyte": 8,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Ergonomic pedal": {
        "firstbyte": 9
      },
      "Kick hard information": {
        "firstbyte": 11,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Brake switch": {
        "firstbyte": 12,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Little"
      },
      "Cruise Control": {
        "firstbyte": 13,
        "ref": true
      },
      "InputShaftSpeed 1": {
        "firstbyte": 14,
        "ref": true
      },
      "InputShaftSpeed 2": {
        "firstbyte": 16,
        "ref": true
      },
      "OutputShaftSpeed": {
        "firstbyte": 18,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Undriven Axle Speed": {
        "firstbyte": 21,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Hand Brake Status": {
        "firstbyte": 20,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Vehicle speed CAN": {
        "firstbyte": 23
      },
      "Engine speed": {
        "firstbyte": 25
      },
      "ShiftLever": {
        "firstbyte": 5
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 53,
    "sentbytes": "21A2",
    "name": "ATCU Inputs Outputs management frame",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "ShiftLever": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "TRS 1 raw value": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "ref": true
      },
      "TRS 2 raw value": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "ref": true
      },
      "TRS Teach-In Status": {
        "firstbyte": 8
      },
      "GearBox Teach-In Status": {
        "firstbyte": 9
      },
      "Clutch Teach-In Status": {
        "firstbyte": 10
      },
      "Misc switches": {
        "firstbyte": 11
      },
      "Vehicle speed CAN": {
        "firstbyte": 12,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Vehicle speed TCU": {
        "firstbyte": 14,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Oil temperature - gearbox": {
        "firstbyte": 16
      },
      "Battery voltage": {
        "firstbyte": 17,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Brake switch": {
        "firstbyte": 18
      },
      "Engine speed": {
        "firstbyte": 19
      },
      "Shift motor 1 current position": {
        "firstbyte": 21
      },
      "Shift motor 2 current position": {
        "firstbyte": 23
      },
      "Shift motor 1 current speed": {
        "firstbyte": 25
      },
      "Shift motor 2 current speed": {
        "firstbyte": 27
      },
      "Shift motor 1 target position": {
        "firstbyte": 29
      },
      "Shift motor 2 target position": {
        "firstbyte": 31
      },
      "Shift motor 1 target speed": {
        "firstbyte": 33
      },
      "Shift motor 2 target speed": {
        "firstbyte": 35
      },
      "InputShaftSpeed 1": {
        "firstbyte": 37
      },
      "InputShaftSpeed 2": {
        "firstbyte": 39
      },
      "OutputShaftSpeed": {
        "firstbyte": 41
      },
      "Internal temperature TCU": {
        "firstbyte": 43
      },
      "Shift drum 1 controller mode": {
        "firstbyte": 44,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Shift drum 2 controller mode": {
        "firstbyte": 45,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Minimum Idle Speed Request": {
        "firstbyte": 46
      },
      "retry counter for reverse gear engagements": {
        "firstbyte": 47
      },
      "retry counter for 1st gear engagement": {
        "firstbyte": 48
      },
      "retry counter for 2nd gear engagement": {
        "firstbyte": 49
      },
      "retry counter for 3rd gear engagement": {
        "firstbyte": 50
      },
      "retry counter for 4th gear engagement": {
        "firstbyte": 51
      },
      "retry counter for 5th gear engagement": {
        "firstbyte": 52
      },
      "retry counter for 6th gear engagement": {
        "firstbyte": 53
      }
    }
  },

    "minbytes": 12,
    "sentbytes": "2190",

    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {

        "ref": true
      }
    }

    "minbytes": 6,
    "replybytes": "590400000000",
    "sentbytes": "1904000000FF",

      "DTCMaskRecord": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      }
    },
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "DTCRecord": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      },
      "StatusOfDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 6
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 3,
    "shiftbytescount": 4,
    "replybytes": "59020000000000",
    "sentbytes": "1902FF",
    "name": "ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "StatusOfDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 7
      },
      "DTCStatus.testFailed": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 7
      },
      "DTCStatus.testFailedThisMonitoringCycle": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 6
      },
      "DTCStatus.pendingDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 5
      },
      "DTCStatus.confirmedDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 4
      },
      "DTCStatus.testNotCompletedSinceLastClear": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 3
      },
      "DTCStatus.testFailedSinceLastClear": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 2
      },
      "DTCStatus.testNotCompletedThisMonitoringCycle": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 1
      },
      "DTCStatus.warningIndicatorRequested": {
        "firstbyte": 7
      },
      "DTCFailureType.Category": {
        "firstbyte": 6
      },
      "DTCFailureType": {
        "firstbyte": 6
      },
      "DTCDeviceIdentifier": {
        "firstbyte": 4
      },
      "DTCFailureType.ManufacturerOrSupplier": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "bitoffset": 4
      },
      "DTCStatusAvailabilityMask": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 2,
    "replybytes": "50",
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "10C0",
    "name": "StartDiagnosticSession",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "SessionName": {
        "firstbyte": 2
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 27,
    "sentbytes": "21A3",
    "name": "ATCU failure management frame",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Current failures - byte 1": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Current failures - byte 2": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Current failures - byte 3": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Current failures - byte 4": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Current failures - byte 5": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Memorized failures - byte 1": {
        "firstbyte": 11,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Memorized failures - byte 2": {
        "firstbyte": 12,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Memorized failures - byte 3": {
        "firstbyte": 13,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Memorized failures - byte 4": {
        "firstbyte": 14,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Memorized failures - byte 5": {
        "firstbyte": 15,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Current failures - byte 6": {
        "firstbyte": 8,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Memorized failures - byte 6": {
        "firstbyte": 16,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Current failures - byte 7": {
        "firstbyte": 9,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Current failures - byte 8": {
        "firstbyte": 10,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Memorized failures - byte 7": {
        "firstbyte": 17,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Memorized failures - byte 8": {
        "firstbyte": 18,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Current active LimpHomeMode - byte 1": {
        "firstbyte": 20,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Current active LimpHomeMode - byte 2": {
        "firstbyte": 21,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Current active LimpHomeMode - byte 3": {
        "firstbyte": 22,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Eeprom corruption flag": {
        "firstbyte": 19,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Current active LimpHomeMode - byte 4": {
        "firstbyte": 23,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Mileage counter since last LH occured": {
        "firstbyte": 24,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Driving cycle counter since lasr LH occured": {
        "firstbyte": 26,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Failure Lights Status": {
        "firstbyte": 27,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 6,
    "replybytes": "590600000000",
    "sentbytes": "1906000000FF",
    "name": "ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData",

        "firstbyte": 8

    }
  },
